scripts.test:db: pnpm --filter @feedback-360/db test:db && pnpm --filter @feedback-360/client test:db && pnpm --filter @feedback-360/core test:db
scripts.test:db:full: pnpm --filter @feedback-360/db test:db:full && pnpm --filter @feedback-360/client test:db:full && pnpm --filter @feedback-360/core test:db:full
scripts.checks: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:db && pnpm --filter @feedback-360/web build
